roleModel.label: Public
roleModel.description: Unauthenticated or unverified public browsing access.
roleModel.notes: Can consume public civic information but cannot participate in verified civic signals.

roleModel.label: Verified Resident
roleModel.description: A person with a durable residency claim.
roleModel.notes: Participation rights are equal to verified voters; segmentation is reported separately and never used as hidden weighting.

roleModel.label: Verified Voter
roleModel.description: A person with durable residency and voter-registration claims.
roleModel.notes: Verified voter is a signal segment, not a higher-weight vote class.

roleModel.label: Trusted Citizen
roleModel.description: A verified participant with trust claims suitable for stewardship workflows.
roleModel.notes: Trusted Citizen status expands stewardship capabilities, not voting weight.

roleModel.label: Government
roleModel.description: Government staff or official workflow access with product-boundary controls.
roleModel.notes: Government users cannot control public civic truth or verified civic participation.

roleModel.label: Admin
roleModel.notes: Administrative capabilities are audited and separated from public civic participation.

sampleClaims.notes: Durable claim issued; sensitive source evidence should be removed when feasible.
Durable claim issued; sensitive source evidence should be removed when feasible.

verificationPolicy.targetModel: Verify -> Create Claim -> Remove Source Evidence

securityControls.label: MFA Foundation
securityControls.purpose: Allow high-risk role and verification workflows to require a second factor later.

securityControls.label: RBAC
securityControls.purpose: Separate public, verified participant, government, and admin capabilities.

securityControls.label: Audit Logging
securityControls.purpose: Record sensitive verification, moderation, admin, and source-ingestion events.

securityControls.label: Session Management
securityControls.purpose: Support future session revocation, device review, and sensitive-action prompts.

securityControls.label: Suspicious Login Detection
securityControls.purpose: Flag anomalous login and verification attempts without exposing private details.

securityControls.label: Anti-Brigading Framework
securityControls.purpose: Detect coordinated manipulation while preserving equal participation rights.

securityControls.label: Duplicate Account Detection
securityControls.purpose: Prevent duplicate verified claims from silently multiplying civic signals.

securityControls.label: Verification Data Separation
securityControls.purpose: Issue durable claims and remove sensitive source evidence when feasible.

dataDomainSeparation.separationRule: Public records remain source-attributed and do not expose private user identity evidence.
Profile and claims metadata are separate from verification source evidence.
Sensitive evidence is retained only as needed to issue claims and should not be joined into public civic data.
GovCRM tenant data cannot control public civic truth or verified participation rights.
